image.title: NAR Gianotti, S Recalcati, F Fantini, C Riva, M Milani, E Dainese, F Boggio

item.title: Histopathological Study of a Broad Spectrum of Skin Dermatoses in Patients Affected or Highly Suspected of Infection by COVID-19 in the Northern Part of Italy: Analysis of the Many Faces of the Viral-Induced Skin Diseases in Previous and New Reported Cases.
